content: We can refactor the OpenClaw ACP agent harness architecture to embed a modular 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism as a pluggable external harness session, letting end-users swap in different curiosity-driven exploration modules just like they currently swap in external coding agents for task execution. This creates a distributed multi-agent system where specialized 'curiosity agents' drive autonomous exploration of novel environments, while task agents handle end-goal execution.
source_topics: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
trigger_topic: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
